name: yourbooks-integrator-workspace
description: YourBooks → EFRIS integrator. Receives ERP webhooks and fiscalizes via the EFRIS middleware. Vite SPA + Express, mirroring the YourBooks POS fast architecture.

scripts.dev: concurrently -n server,client -c blue,green "npm run dev --prefix server" "npm run dev --prefix client"
scripts.install:all: npm install --prefix server && npm install --prefix client
